headline: Netflix debuts new 'Playground' gaming app for kids
summary: Netflix doubled down on its gaming efforts on Monday, launching a new app called "Netflix ‌Playground" that would feature games built around popular children's characters such ‌as Peppa Pig and Sesame Street.  One of the main challenges, analysts believe, is Netflix's relatively limited portfolio of iconic intellectual property compared with rivals such as Warner Bros Discovery, which owns franchises, including DC Comics.  Some ‌of the most popular ⁠games from Netflix include Rockstar Games' "GTA: San Andreas", and those based on its own hit shows such as "Squid Game: Unleashed."
